hero.headline: Land your next job with
hero.subheadline: Upload your resume, paste a job description, and get instant skill match analysis, a tailored cover letter, and interview prep.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to apply with confidence
features.subtitle: Three AI-powered tools built into one seamless workflow.

matchScore.title: Match score
matchScore.description: See exactly how well your profile matches the job requirements with a percentage score and skill breakdown.

coverLetter.title: Cover letter
coverLetter.description: Get a tailored cover letter written using your actual experience and the job's specific requirements.

interviewKit.title: Interview kit
interviewKit.description: Prepare with likely interview questions and suggested answers based on your background and the role.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to a stronger application
howItWorks.subtitle: From upload to interview-ready in under a minute.

step1.title: Upload your resume
step1.description: Drop in your PDF resume. The AI reads and parses your skills, experience, and projects automatically.

step2.title: Paste the job description
step2.description: Copy any job listing and paste it in. The AI extracts required skills, seniority level, and role details.

step3.title: Get your results
step3.description: Receive a match score, skill gap analysis, a tailored cover letter, and 5 interview questions with suggested answers.

bottomCta.label: Get started free
bottomCta.title: Ready to apply smarter?
bottomCta.subtitle: No account needed. Just upload your resume and analyze.
